intent: Write a mid-depth comparison of 'cheap versus mid-tier cookware' — what actually fails. (1) One Stop Market shopping site — browse home-kitchen and collect at least 4 cookware products at different price tiers (non-stick pan, stainless pan, pot, lid set). Record name, price, rating, review count. (2) Reddit — browse /f/LifeProTips AND /f/personalfinance for posts on cookware that lasts vs that peels. Collect at least 3 posts with title, score, comment count. The report must: (a) table the 4 picks across tiers, (b) apply community durability rules, (c) commit to a single 'buy once' recommendation under $60, (d) close with what to repair vs replace. Cite every claim.
